desc: PlantroomPresetSaveToLocalStoreCommand — validate + write a preset to %APPDATA%/MEPBridge/presets/plantroom_layout/.
summary: PlantroomPresetSaveToLocalStoreCommand — validate + write a preset to %APPDATA%/MEPBridge/presets/plantroom_layout/.
notfor: Supabase sync — use the Sync command.
logictree:
1) Validate Resolver_Name + Resolver_PresetJson.
2) Delegate to SavePlantroomConfigToLocalFile.Save with schema validation.
3) Emit ok + file path.
